user.title: Connect to Setlist.fm
user.description: Enter your Setlist.fm user ID and API key. You can find your user ID in your profile URL, and get an API key from https://www.setlist.fm/settings/api

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Setlist.fm. Please check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your API key and try again.
error.user_not_found: User not found. Please check your User ID.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

init.title: Configure Setlist.fm Options
init.description: Customize how concerts are displayed and refreshed.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force a data refresh for one or all setlist.fm config entries.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID to refresh. If omitted, all entries are refreshed.
